infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Plategram uses the camera to take a photo of your meal so it can estimate the calories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Plategram needs photo access so you can pick a meal photo from your library.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Plategram reads your step count to estimate calories burned from walking.

plugins.cameraPermission: Plategram uses the camera to take a photo of your meal so it can estimate the calories.
plugins.photosPermission: Plategram needs photo access so you can pick a meal photo from your library.

plugins.motionPermission: Plategram reads your step count to estimate calories burned from walking.
